name: Eftsure
description: Eftsure protects outgoing B2B payments from BEC, invoice and vendor fraud by cross-checking payee bank details against a verified database of millions of entities. It integrates with ERPs and accounting platforms via API for accounts payabl

seo.title: Eftsure — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: Eftsure: Eftsure protects outgoing B2B payments from BEC, invoice and vendor fraud by cross-checking payee bank details against a verified database of millions

when_to_use: Payee bank detail verification before B2B wire transfers
BEC invoice fraud prevention for accounts payable teams
ERP integration for automated payment beneficiary validation
Vendor bank change request verification workflow
Real-time payment fraud protection for CFO treasury controls

pros: Verified database of millions of payee bank details
Catches BEC and invoice fraud before payout
ERP and AP integrations out of the box
Niche focus produces strong AP outcomes
cons: Coverage strongest in Australia, thinner elsewhere
Requires changes to AP workflow to add value
Pricing geared to mid-market and enterprise
review.verdict: The sharpest tool for B2B payment and BEC fraud, but only if your finance team actually uses it in the AP flow.
review.best_for: Finance teams in ANZ and UK mid-market protecting outgoing B2B bank transfers.
review.not_for: Consumer fraud, card payments or companies with light AP volume.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone, no explicit peak-lock evidence
